zh.lifeSummary: 當Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund於1115年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿維利海內可時，他的父親Burkhard I Graff von Loccum-Hallermund25歲，母親Gräfin Adelheid von Loccum-Hallermund21歲。他和Beatrix von Rheineck至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1167年享年52歲。

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

en.lifeSummary: When Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund was born in 1115, in Rheineck, Ahrweiler, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Burkhard I Graff von Loccum-Hallermund, was 25 and his mother, Gräfin Adelheid von Loccum-Hallermund, was 21. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Beatrix von Rheineck. He died in 1167, at the age of 52.

Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Beatrix von Rheineck. Il est décédé en 1167, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund 1115 in Rheineck, Landkreis Ahrweiler, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Burkhard I Graff von Loccum-Hallermund 25 und seine Mutter Gräfin Adelheid von Loccum-Hallermund 21. Er hatte mit Beatrix von Rheineck mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1167 im Alter von 52 Jahren.

ko.lifeSummary: Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund(이)가 1115년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 아h위러 리이네c크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Burkhard I Graff von Loccum-Hallermund(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Gräfin Adelheid von Loccum-Hallermund(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Beatrix von Rheineck(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1167년 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund родился в 1115 г. в местности рааинекк, ландкрис ахрвилир, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Burkhard I Graff von Loccum-Hallermund было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Gräfin Adelheid von Loccum-Hallermund, 21. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Beatrix von Rheineck. Он умер в 1167 г. в возрасте 52 лет.
